exploreJobs: Explore job opportunities and apply easily.
tutorDesc: Help children or adults learn subjects you are good at.
homeCookdesc: Cook delicious meals for your community or online orders. Earn while working flexible hours.
houseHelperdesc: Assist households with cleaning, organizing, and daily chores. Good earning with flexible timing.
bakingHelperdesc: Assist bakers in preparing dough, decorating cakes, and managing kitchen tasks. Flexible part-time work.
packingAssistantdesc: Help businesses pack products for shipping or events. Simple tasks with flexible timing and decent pay.
deliveryPersondesc: Deliver packages or food locally. Flexible hours and a great way to earn extra income.
freelanceDesignerdesc: Create graphics, posters, or social media content for local businesses or online clients. Work from home with flexible hours.
socialmediaAssistantdesc: Help businesses manage their social media accounts, create posts, and engage with followers. Flexible online work.
eventOrganiserdesc: Assist in planning and organizing local events, parties, or community programs. Flexible part-time work with good exposure.
